text:
Accuracy and freshness require continuous data updates and careful verification.
When source documents change often, periodic re-embedding and re-indexing may be needed.
Evaluation should track answer correctness and citation quality over time.

Low latency systems prioritize quick response times.
To achieve this, systems usually keep context windows short, reduce retrieval depth,
and cache frequently asked questions.

Security-oriented RAG systems focus on minimizing data exposure.
Sensitive data should be filtered before it leaves edge environments.
Audit logs and access control are important for compliance.
